title: Intensely Smoky Saudi Arabian Mackerel Onigiri
description: A resinous and shaggy midnight-craving Saudi Arabian dish featuring smoked mackerel, nigiri shaping, and ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients, this onigiri is perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Prepare the smoked mackerel by flaking it into small pieces and setting it aside.
Prepare the Japanese short grain rice according to the package instructions and set it aside to cool.
Cut the nori seaweed sheets into smaller pieces and set them aside.
Cut the pickled ginger and scallions into thin slices and set them aside.
Mix the sesame oil, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl and set it aside.
Combine the cooled Japanese short grain rice, smoked mackerel, pickled ginger, and scallions in a large bowl and mix well.
Add the sesame oil mixture to the rice mixture and mix until everything is well combined.
Using wet hands, shape the rice mixture into small triangular shapes and wrap each one with a piece of nori seaweed.
Serve the onigiri immediately and enjoy.
